title: Silverfort AI Agent Security
description: Silverfort discovers all AI agents and associated non-human identities (NHIs) — service accounts, API keys, and MCP connections — to produce an accurate pre-deployment inventory. It identifies over-privileged accounts, orphaned credentials, and agents lacking authentication policies before any workload is authorized to operate.

items: Identify system-wide non-human Identities & Auth Protocols, Draft policy for Agent privilege boundaries, Draft policy Agent for tool scopes
Enforce zero-trust policies between agents, tools, & external APIs, Configure Inter-agent authorization policies, capabilities, & roles
Runtime guardrails & moderation; anomalous tool use
Correlate telemetry from agent step tracing, tool execution, & message logs.
Enforce role- & task-based access policies across agent populations & their tool access.
